description: TanStack Query Frontend Refactoring - Replace manual useEffect+useState data fetching with TanStack Query v5 for caching, deduplication, polling, and optimistic updates

userStories.title: Install TanStack Query and wire up QueryClientProvider
userStories.description: As a developer, I need TanStack Query installed and a QueryClient configured so all subsequent hooks can use it.
acceptanceCriteria: Run `bun add @tanstack/react-query` and `bun add -d @tanstack/react-query-devtools` — both appear in package.json
Create `src/lib/queryClient.ts` exporting a singleton QueryClient with: staleTime: 30_000, gcTime: 5 * 60_000, retry: 1, refetchOnWindowFocus: true, mutations.retry: 0

Create `src/lib/queryKeys.ts` exporting a `queryKeys` object with typed factory functions for: instances, settings, collapsePatterns, notificationSettings, mrList(instanceId), myMRList(instanceId), mr(mrId), mrFiles(mrId), mrDiffRefs(mrId), mrComments(mrId), mrFileComments(mrId, filePath), mrReviewers(mrId), fileContent(instanceId, projectId, filePath, sha), fileContentBase64(instanceId, projectId, filePath, sha), gitattributes(instanceId, projectId), pipelineProjects(instanceId), pipelineStatuses(instanceId, projectIds[]), pipelineJobs(instanceId, projectId, pipelineId), jobTrace(instanceId, projectId, jobId), companionStatus()
`src/main.tsx` wraps `<App />` in `<QueryClientProvider client={queryClient}>`
`<ReactQueryDevtools />` imported from `@tanstack/react-query-devtools` and rendered only inside `{import.meta.env.DEV && <ReactQueryDevtools />}`
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Centralize Tauri event → cache invalidation in tauriEvents.ts
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a single module that wires Tauri backend events to query invalidation so scattered tauriListen calls across hooks can be removed.
acceptanceCriteria: Create `src/lib/tauriEvents.ts` exporting `setupTauriEventListeners(): Promise<() => void>`
Module has a top-level `let initialized = false` guard — calling setupTauriEventListeners() twice is a no-op on the second call

`mr-updated` handler: debounce 500ms, then call queryClient.invalidateQueries for { queryKey: ['mr', mrId] }, { queryKey: ['mrFiles', mrId] }, { queryKey: ['mrDiffRefs', mrId] }, { queryKey: ['fileContent'] }, { queryKey: ['mrList'] }, { queryKey: ['myMRList'] }

`action-synced` handler dispatches by action_type — comment/reply: invalidate ['mrComments', mrId] and ['mrFileComments', mrId]; approve/unapprove: invalidate ['mr', mrId], ['mrList'], ['myMRList']; resolve/unresolve: invalidate ['mrComments', mrId]
All invalidateQueries calls use v5 object filter syntax: `queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: [...] })` not legacy array shorthand
`setupTauriEventListeners()` called once in `src/main.tsx`
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create Phase 1 simple query hook files
userStories.description: As a developer, I need standalone query hooks for instances, settings, companion status, and gitattributes so duplicated useEffect fetches can be replaced.
acceptanceCriteria: Create `src/hooks/queries/useInstancesQuery.ts` — useQuery wrapping listInstances(), staleTime: 60_000
Create `src/hooks/queries/useCurrentUserQuery.ts` — calls useInstancesQuery() and derives authenticatedUsername for the given instanceId via useMemo; no new Tauri calls
Create `src/hooks/queries/useSettingsQuery.ts` — useQuery wrapping getSettings()
Create `src/hooks/queries/useCollapsePatternsQuery.ts` — useQuery wrapping getCollapsePatterns()
Create `src/hooks/queries/useGitattributesQuery.ts` — useQuery wrapping getGitattributesPatterns(instanceId, projectId), staleTime: 10 * 60_000, enabled: !!instanceId && !!projectId
Create `src/hooks/queries/useCompanionStatusQuery.ts` — useQuery wrapping getCompanionStatus(), refetchInterval: 30_000

Create `src/hooks/queries/useHasApprovedMRsQuery.ts` — uses useQueries over all instances from useInstancesQuery(); each sub-query fetches listMyMergeRequests(instanceId); returns boolean: any MR has approvalStatus === 'approved'; always fetches independently
All files created in `src/hooks/queries/` directory
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Update Phase 1 consumers and delete replaced hooks
userStories.description: As a developer, I need all consumers of instances, settings, companion status, and hasApprovedMRs to use the new query hooks so old useEffect patterns are removed.
acceptanceCriteria: `src/App.tsx`: replace listInstances() useEffect with useInstancesQuery(); replace useHasApprovedMRs() with useHasApprovedMRsQuery(); replace useCompanionStatus() with useCompanionStatusQuery()
`src/pages/MRListPage.tsx`: replace listInstances() useEffect with useInstancesQuery()
`src/pages/MyMRsPage.tsx`: replace listInstances() useEffect with useInstancesQuery()
All Settings section components that call getSettings() or listInstances() inside useEffect replaced with useSettingsQuery() or useInstancesQuery()
`src/hooks/useCompanionStatus.ts` deleted
`src/hooks/useHasApprovedMRs.ts` deleted
No remaining direct calls to listInstances(), getSettings(), or getCompanionStatus() inside useEffect hooks
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create MR list and MR detail query hook files
userStories.description: As a developer, I need TQ-backed query hooks for MR lists and MR detail data so navigating between MRs uses the cache instead of re-fetching.
acceptanceCriteria: Create `src/hooks/queries/useMRListQuery.ts` — useQuery wrapping listMergeRequests(instanceId), enabled: !!instanceId
Create `src/hooks/queries/useMyMRListQuery.ts` — useQuery wrapping listMyMergeRequests(instanceId), enabled: !!instanceId
Create `src/hooks/queries/useMRDetailQuery.ts` — useQuery wrapping getMergeRequestById(mrId), enabled: mrId > 0
Create `src/hooks/queries/useDiffFilesQuery.ts` — useQuery wrapping getMergeRequestFiles(mrId), enabled: mrId > 0
Create `src/hooks/queries/useDiffRefsQuery.ts` — useQuery wrapping getDiffRefs(mrId), enabled: mrId > 0
Create `src/hooks/queries/useMRReviewersQuery.ts` — useQuery wrapping getMrReviewers(mrId), enabled: mrId > 0
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Refactor MR data hooks and MRList component to use TQ queries
userStories.description: As a developer, I need useMRData, useMyMRData, and MRList to compose TQ query hooks so tauriListen and manual useEffect fetch patterns are removed.
acceptanceCriteria: `src/pages/MRDetailPage/useMRData.ts`: compose useMRDetailQuery + useDiffFilesQuery + useDiffRefsQuery + useGitattributesQuery + useCollapsePatternsQuery; remove tauriListen('mr-updated') call; do NOT remove clearFileCache/clearFileCacheRef yet (removed in US-007)
`src/pages/MyMRDetailPage/useMyMRData.ts`: compose useMRDetailQuery + useMRReviewersQuery + useCurrentUserQuery; remove manual useEffect fetches

`src/components/MRList/MRList.tsx`: data from useMRListQuery(instanceId); tauriListen('mr-updated') removed; reducer slimmed to UI-only state (syncStatus, newMrIds); query.isLoading drives foreground spinner; query.isFetching drives background indicator; newMrIds tracking uses useRef comparing previous vs current query data in a useEffect
`src/pages/MRListPage.tsx`: refresh button calls queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: queryKeys.mrList(instanceId) })
`src/pages/MyMRsPage.tsx`: replace loadMRs useEffect with useMyMRListQuery; remove tauriListen('mr-updated')
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Replace file content dual-cache with useFileContentQuery
userStories.description: As a user, I want file navigation between diff files to feel instant when already viewed, with adjacent files prefetched automatically.
acceptanceCriteria: Create `src/hooks/queries/useFileContentQuery.ts` with text variant: queryKey: queryKeys.fileContent(instanceId, projectId, filePath, sha), staleTime: Infinity, gcTime: 30 * 60_000, refetchOnWindowFocus: false, refetchOnMount: false
Image/binary variant uses queryKeys.fileContentBase64(...) with same settings, calls getFileContentBase64 instead of getFileContent
Query function handles all edge cases: isNewFile → return '' for base; isDeletedFile → return '' for head; renamed files use oldPath for base and newPath for head
getCachedFilePair (SQLite read-by-mrId) is NOT called in query function — TQ cache handles deduplication
keepPreviousData is NOT used on file content queries
Adjacent file prefetching: useEffect after active file query resolves calls queryClient.prefetchQuery for currentIdx-1 and currentIdx+1 in reviewable file list
useLayoutEffect removed from useFileContent.ts
clearFileCacheRef and clearFileCache removed from src/pages/MRDetailPage/index.tsx and useMRData.ts
Navigating back to a previously-viewed file shows content immediately with no loading state
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create comment query and all mutation hook files
userStories.description: As a developer, I need TQ-backed hooks for fetching and mutating comments so optimistic updates are handled consistently.
acceptanceCriteria: Create `src/hooks/queries/useCommentsQuery.ts` — useQuery wrapping listComments(mrId), staleTime: 30_000, enabled: mrId > 0

Create `src/hooks/mutations/useAddCommentMutation.ts` — onMutate: cancel queries, snapshot cache, append optimistic comment with negative ID; onError: rollback; onSettled: does NOT call invalidateQueries (invalidation by action-synced event)
Create `src/hooks/mutations/useReplyCommentMutation.ts` — same onMutate/onError/onSettled pattern, optimistically appends reply
Create `src/hooks/mutations/useResolveDiscussionMutation.ts` — onMutate: optimistically toggle resolved on all comments with matching discussionId; onError: rollback; onSettled: does NOT invalidate
Create `src/hooks/mutations/useDeleteCommentMutation.ts` — onMutate: snapshot + remove comment optimistically; onError: rollback

Create `src/hooks/mutations/useAddInlineCommentMutation.ts` — request shape includes filePath + newLine/oldLine; onMutate optimistically updates both ['mrFileComments', mrId, filePath] and ['mrComments', mrId] caches
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Refactor useActivityData to use comment query and mutation hooks
userStories.description: As a developer, I need useActivityData composed from TQ hooks so the manual tauriListen and useEffect fetch patterns are removed.
acceptanceCriteria: `src/hooks/useActivityData.ts` uses useCommentsQuery(mrId) instead of manual useEffect fetch
useActivityData uses useCurrentUserQuery(instanceId) instead of its own listInstances() call
addComment, replyToComment, resolveDiscussion, deleteComment delegate to mutation hooks from US-008
tauriListen('action-synced') removed from useActivityData — handled by tauriEvents.ts
Thread building (buildThreads, systemEvents) remains as useMemo derived from commentsQuery.data
A comment that fails mutation has its optimistic entry automatically removed (onError rollback)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create pipeline query hooks and refactor pipeline pages to remove polling
userStories.description: As a user, I want the pipeline dashboard and job log to update automatically while jobs run and stop polling automatically when they complete.
acceptanceCriteria: Create `src/hooks/queries/usePipelineJobsQuery.ts` — refetchInterval: (query) => hasActiveJobs(query.state.data) ? 10_000 : false, refetchIntervalInBackground: false
Create `src/hooks/queries/usePipelineStatusesQuery.ts` — refetchInterval: (query) => hasActivePipelines(query.state.data) ? 30_000 : 120_000, refetchIntervalInBackground: false
Create `src/hooks/queries/useJobTraceQuery.ts` — refetchInterval: isActiveStatus(status) ? 3_000 : false, staleTime: isActiveStatus(status) ? 0 : Infinity, refetchIntervalInBackground: false

`src/pages/PipelineDetailPage/usePipelineData.ts`: drop reducer entirely; jobs from usePipelineJobsQuery; activeActions as useState<Set<number>>; job action handlers call queryClient.invalidateQueries after mutation

`src/pages/PipelinesPage/usePipelinesData.ts`: drop reducer entirely; selectedInstanceId + searchQuery as plain useState; emitPipelineChanges as useEffect comparing prev vs current usePipelineStatusesQuery.data via useRef; when project list changes call queryClient.removeQueries({ queryKey: ['pipelineStatuses'] })
`src/pages/JobLogPage.tsx`: three polling useEffect hooks removed; uses useJobTraceQuery + usePipelineJobsQuery
All manual setTimeout/setInterval polling code removed from pipeline files
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Migrate file comments and CommentOverlay to TQ
userStories.description: As a developer, I need inline file comments to go through TQ so the file comment cache and activity comment cache stay consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: Create `src/hooks/queries/useFileCommentsQuery.ts` — useQuery wrapping getFileComments(mrId, filePath), enabled: mrId > 0 && !!filePath
`src/pages/MRDetailPage/useFileComments.ts` updated to use useFileCommentsQuery internally
`src/components/CommentOverlay.tsx` updated to call useAddInlineCommentMutation instead of calling the service directly
Adding an inline comment via CommentOverlay optimistically updates both ['mrFileComments', mrId, filePath] and ['mrComments', mrId] caches
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Migrate approval mutations, settings invalidation, and useCodeTab lazy loading
userStories.description: As a developer, I need approvals and settings to go through TQ so the UI stays consistent without manual cache management.
acceptanceCriteria: Create `src/hooks/mutations/useApproveMRMutation.ts` — onMutate: snapshot + optimistically set userHasApproved: true on ['mr', mrId] cache; onError: rollback from snapshot; MR list refresh driven by action-synced approve handler in tauriEvents.ts
Create `src/hooks/mutations/useUnapproveMRMutation.ts` — same pattern, sets userHasApproved: false
All settings saves in Settings section components call queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: queryKeys.settings() }) after persisting
`src/pages/MyMRDetailPage/useCodeTab.ts` uses enabled: activeTab === 'code' on its diff/file queries; on MR change calls queryClient.removeQueries for relevant diff and file content keys
No remaining raw useEffect + useState fetch patterns anywhere in src/
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Surface TQ error objects consistently across the UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see a clear error message when data fails to load instead of silently empty states.
acceptanceCriteria: MR list page displays an error message when useMRListQuery returns an error (not an empty list)
MR detail page displays an error message when useMRDetailQuery or useDiffFilesQuery returns an error
Pipeline dashboard displays an error message when usePipelineStatusesQuery returns an error
Job log page displays an error message when useJobTraceQuery returns an error
Error messages strip the 'Tauri IPC error:' prefix — display the human-readable part only
Previously silently-ignored errors that returned empty arrays now surface a message where data is essential
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Browser verification pass across all major flows
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to run through all major UI flows in the browser after the refactor is complete to confirm loading states, data display, and interactions work correctly end-to-end.
acceptanceCriteria: App launches without console errors or white screens
MR list loads and displays merge requests for each configured instance
MR detail opens; files panel and diff viewer load correctly
Navigating between diff files shows content instantly for cached files, loading state for uncached
Adjacent file prefetch verified: navigate forward once, go back — second visit is instant with no loading state
Comments load in activity drawer; adding a comment shows optimistic entry immediately
Resolving a discussion thread toggles resolved state immediately (optimistic)
Pipeline dashboard loads; status badges reflect current pipeline states
Job log page streams trace output while job is active; stops polling when job completes
Settings page loads and saves without error
React Query Devtools panel is visible and accessible in dev build
No duplicate Tauri IPC calls observed for the same resource during normal navigation
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
